column1: # Keep patterns simple. The script does case-insensitive matching.

column2: Back door lock is unavailable. Check batteries first, then bolt/strike-plate alignment, then wireless mesh/radio route.
Front door lock is unavailable. Check batteries first, then bolt alignment, then wireless mesh/radio route.
Solar shed camera is unavailable. This Reolink wireless camera is intentionally unreliable/disabled; only re-add if it is restored.
Frigate expected camera is missing. Check Frigate config, disabled cameras, and whether the camera should still be in config/frigate_critical_cameras.txt.
Frigate snapshot failed. Check camera stream, go2rtc stream name, and whether the camera is reachable.
Node-RED flow tab is missing. Check whether a tab was renamed or accidentally deleted.

column1: Current error hints found in Docker logs
column2: Check current-error-lines.txt in the latest main-server snapshot. If only known noisy devices appear, add targeted ignore patterns; otherwise fix the noisy service.
High GPU VRAM. Check nvidia-smi/pids; expected Parakeet/Ollama/Frigate use can be ignored, but unknown large processes should be investigated.
Root disk is high. Check Docker build cache, ComfyUI layer size, old images, and logs before doing broad prune.
NAS issue. Check ping, mount status, df usage, and whether the expected NAS path is mounted.
HA backup issue. Check HA backup sensors first; HAOS writes backups directly, so main-server NAS file scans may not apply.
HA entity unavailable. Check device power/battery first, then integration status, then network/mesh route.
HA entity unknown. Check integration state, template sensors, and whether the entity was renamed.
